issues.detail: The skill relies on vendor-specific APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and does not support arbitrary AI agents.

scenarios.name: Extract invoice fields with OpenAI guaranteed JSON
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses openai.beta.chat.completions.parse with zodResponseFormat and a Zod schema as in the skill, while baseline relies on response_format json_object plus manual parsing and validation.

scenarios.name: Force structured event extraction from Claude
scenarios.rationale: Treatment forces output via Anthropic tools with tool_choice {type: 'tool', name: ...} and pulls the tool_use block, while baseline prompts Claude to emit raw JSON and parses it.
